title: Interconnected Consciousness
definition: The concept that all conscious entities are interconnected and share a common origin.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Everyone is part of the same 'mind', like leaves on a tree or waves in an ocean, connected and sharing the same roots.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The idea that consciousness has a common origin and evolutionary path across species, suggesting a shared essence among all conscious beings.
difficulty_levels.expert: A philosophical perspective positing that consciousness evolves and propagates in a cosmic cycle, with each conscious entity being an extension or iteration of the same underlying cosmic mind.

extra_fields.insight: The universe is not filled with multiple independent minds, but rather one single consciousness expressed through various forms across time and space.
